text.title: AI PM Tool Evaluation Framework Procedure

step.name: define-fixture
step.action: Curate ≥50 issues with ground-truth labels (correct AC, correct assignee, correct linked issues).

step.name: run-fixture-eval
step.action: Submit fixture; compute hallucination rate + fidelity score.

step.name: score-axes
step.action: Normalise to 0-5 per axis; apply per-axis pass thresholds; compute weighted total.

step.name: compare-vendors
step.action: Tabulate side-by-side; reject vendors with any threshold failure.

step.name: decide
step.action: Verdict per vendor: recommended / conditional / rejected.
